title: Vileda 1-2 Spray Microfibre Flat Spray Mop, Multicolour
features: Trigger spray gives a directional fine mist spray of cleaning solution direct to the floor.
The cleaning solution tank is in the handle, making it lighter to use and easier to reach into the tightest of spaces.
Microfibre pad combines with Powerzone head for great cleaning performance.
Suitable for use on all hard floor surfaces, but ideal for wood and laminate due to the moisture control of the fine mist spray.
Microfibre Refill pads and Cleaning solution available separately (other cleaning solutions can be used).
description: From the manufacturer Machine washable pad Can be used without a bucket 100 per cent microfibre for optimum cleaning Easy fill container for detergent Removes over 99% of bacteria with just water Vileda 1 2 Spray The Vileda 1-2 Spray is a ready to use mop for in between cleaning of tiled, vinyl and laminate floors. The handle has a refillable liquid compartment, meaning you can use it without a bucket and still get a sparkling result. Removes over 99% of bacteria with just water* *Removes E. coli & S. aureus from hardwood floor & ceramic tile as tested at a 3rd party lab. Spray with Microfibre Pad The trigger spray gives a directional fine mist spray for easy and efficient cleaning on all hard floor surfaces. The Microfibre pad helps with greasy dirt removal, with power zones for extra scrubbing power for removing stubborn marks. Handy Trigger Mechanism Effortlessly dispense water with the 1-2 Spray’s trigger situated on the underside of the handle. You are in total control of how much water is sprayed depending on the surface. Container for Detergent and Water The handle is easily filled with detergent and the rubber cap ensures that it’s fully closed and will not leak. For best results, use with the Vileda 1-2 Spray cleaning solution (available separately).
